arm_grant_air_cas_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_bombs }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_cas
            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }
        add_technology = early_bombs
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

arm_grant_air_heavy_fighters_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_fighters
        }
        add_technology = heavy_fighter2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = heavy_fighter3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1944 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = naval_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1950 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tactical_bombers
        }
        add_technology = jet_tactical_bomber2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tactical_bomber1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_air_transport_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_transport
        }
        add_technology = early_transport_plane
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = bba_early_transport_plane }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1933 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

            check_variable = { var = arm_air_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_dlc = "By Blood Alone"

        add_technology = bba_strategic_airlifter
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_air value = 1948 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_industry_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_fortification_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = basic_fortification_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = coastal_fort_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = excavation1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry

        add_technology = excavation1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = land_fort_tech_1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1938 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = land_fort_tech_1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = land_fort_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_industry
        }
        add_technology = land_fort_tech_2
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coastal_fort_tech_2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1940 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_industry_electronics_nuclear_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = isotope_separation_centrifugal }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_nuclear
            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes
        }
        add_technology = isotope_separation_centrifugal
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor_heavy_water }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 5 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 1943 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2004 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_industry_competence value = 85 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            arm_advanced_tech_allowed = yes

        add_technology = atomic_research

            NOT = { has_tech = nuclear_reactor }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_industry value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

        add_technology = nukes

arm_grant_land_anti_air_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = coldwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = coldwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair0 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair0
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = interwar_antiair }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = interwar_antiair
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_antiair1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_air
        }
        add_technology = sp_antiair1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

arm_grant_land_anti_tank_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mountain_tanks }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_anti_tank

        add_technology = SWE_bofors_antitank_gun
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }

            NOT = { has_tech = artillery6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = artillery6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_artillery3 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 1 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 15 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_artillery
        }
        add_technology = sp_artillery3
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_land_infantry_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = infantry_weapons }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry
        }
        add_technology = infantry_weapons
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = rangers_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_infantry

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

        }
        add_technology = tech_rangers2

arm_grant_land_light_tanks_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = gwtank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = gwtank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1918 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = gwtank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1934 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = basic_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1936 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = improved_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_light_tank_chassis }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1941 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = advanced_light_tank_chassis
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }

        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = IFV_chassis_80s }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1960 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = IFV_chassis_80s
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = light_tank1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_tanks
        }
        add_technology = light_tank1
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = mechanised_infantry2 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

        add_technology = main_battle_tank6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }

            NOT = { has_tech = main_battle_tank_chassis_20s }

            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2020 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_land_tanks_generic_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armored_car1 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 1914 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
        }

    }

            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_5
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = armor_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = armor_tech_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = engine_tech_6 }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_land value = 2030 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_land_competence value = 35 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_tanks_generic
            has_dlc = "No Step Back"
        }
        add_technology = engine_tech_6
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = future_ship_hull_fleet_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_carrier }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 4 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 70 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_carriers
        }
        add_technology = future_carrier
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

arm_grant_naval_heavy_cruisers_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = early_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1980 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = early_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2000 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = basic_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2008 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = improved_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = advanced_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = advanced_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = near_future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2024 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = near_future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = future_heavy_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2032 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_heavy_cruisers
        }
        add_technology = future_heavy_cruiser
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
}

            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 3 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 45 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_light_cruisers
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_airplane_launcher
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_light_cruiser }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }

arm_grant_naval_naval_support_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = submarine_mine_laying }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1922 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = submarine_mine_laying
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = improved_naval_mines }

            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = improved_naval_mines
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {

        add_technology = mtg_tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = tank_landing_craft }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2012 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_naval_support
        }
        add_technology = tank_landing_craft
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = modern_ship_torpedo_launcher }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 2016 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 20 compare = greater_than_or_equals }

arm_grant_naval_submarines_novum_vexillum = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = basic_submarine_snorkel }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = basic_submarine_snorkel
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech }
            check_variable = { var = arm_grant_counter value = arm_quarterly_cap compare = less_than }
            check_variable = { var = arm_target_year_naval value = 1939 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_tier_index value = 2 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            check_variable = { var = arm_naval_competence value = 25 compare = greater_than_or_equals }
            has_country_flag = arm_cat_submarines
            has_dlc = "Man the Guns"
        }
        add_technology = sp_aip_engine_improved_tech
        add_to_variable = { arm_grant_counter = 1 }
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_tech = sp_aip_engine_advanced_tech }
